thread_strategy.batching_reason: Canyang Ao needs coherent geography but different image states: master plates, core village sets, and chase/callback sets. Three disjoint batches keep output paths stable while reducing visual drift.
worker_requirements: Use available image generation capability for raster assets.
Write final confirmed PNG images exactly to the assigned expected_files.
Create or reuse project/severed-homeland/assets/locations/canyangao/history only for retained intermediate versions.
Retained intermediate, rejected, or superseded images must be moved to history/ with filename suffixes such as .v001 before the extension.
Do not create version directories such as v1, v2, versions, or drafts.
Do not edit existing style-board, faction-emblem, character, prop, bible, script, director, or shot files.
Use current stable faction emblem PNGs only as references for small worn scene marks; do not redesign, redraw, replace, or overwrite emblem files.
Do not generate text labels, captions, Chinese characters, letters, UI, or watermarks inside images.
Return a compact JSON manifest listing final files, dimensions, history files, QC notes, and blocked items.

batches.thread_title: 断航故土 残阳坳主场景状态图 v01
batches.worker_instruction: Generate the four master/state PNG assets from prompt records in project/severed-homeland/prompts/project-canyangao-location-image-prompts.json. Keep the same Canyang Ao geography across dusk, fire, and aftermath states. Write each accepted final image to its exact expected file. Return a compact JSON manifest with asset_id, prompt_id, output_path, dimensions, history_files, and QC notes.

retry_on: space relation between medicine house, old well, courtyard, valley, and north slope is unreadable
fire image becomes full-screen flames or mass slaughter panorama
aftermath image opens the old relay door or shows a glowing portal
human village becomes a beggar slum or golden pastoral paradise
visible text, labels, letters, Chinese characters, UI, or watermark appears
existing faction emblem is redesigned or replaced

batches.thread_title: 断航故土 残阳坳村口药屋旧井场景图 v01
batches.worker_instruction: Generate the five core Canyang Ao village-set PNG assets from prompt records in project/severed-homeland/prompts/project-canyangao-location-image-prompts.json. Keep the medicine house, rear courtyard, old well, and blood-check gate visually compatible. Write each accepted final image to its exact expected file. Return a compact JSON manifest with asset_id, prompt_id, output_path, dimensions, history_files, and QC notes.

retry_on: hidden relay compartment appears in the general medicine-house interior plate
old well is isolated from the medicine-house courtyard
Qingming tools look modern medical or hospital-like
Zhaoming old mark becomes a full clean emblem
Qingming seal becomes a redesigned logo
visible text, labels, letters, Chinese characters, UI, or watermark appears

batches.thread_title: 断航故土 残阳坳逃亡出口与回望场景图 v01
batches.worker_instruction: Generate the four chase/callback Canyang Ao PNG assets from prompt records in project/severed-homeland/prompts/project-canyangao-location-image-prompts.json. Keep route direction clear from well escape to side lane, wooden cart north road, valley trap, and outer slope callback. Write each accepted final image to its exact expected file. Return a compact JSON manifest with asset_id, prompt_id, output_path, dimensions, history_files, and QC notes.

retry_on: hunter trap mechanics are not readable
Mingjin or Ling Wing becomes a large combat spell
Zhaomian abduction becomes torture display or new character subplot
cart tracks do not point toward north road
outer slope image opens the old relay door or shows a glowing portal
visible text, labels, letters, Chinese characters, UI, or watermark appears

launch_policy.approval_needed: The prompt and task plan should be reviewed before launching image-generation background threads.
